title: Quiver Logic
description: Introduces intelligent logic for drawing projectiles directly from bundles/shulkers in your inventory
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b03f08802a8465027c31f2b5f64b853b550e278.png)

## Description
Quiver Logic is a vanilla friendly mod that makes possible using bows/crossbows to shoot arrows/fireworks from directly inside bundles/shulkers
## Important notes
- Imitates normal vanilla behavior, but inside bundles/shulkers
- For arrows, it works inside bundles/shulkers that are anywhere in the inventory
- For fireworks, it only works if the bundle/shulker is in your offhand (like vanilla behavior)
- Preference will be given to arrows that are directly in the inventory; if there's only in bundles/shulkers, it will consume from there

## How it works
Place all your arrows inside bundles/shulkers, as the game will prioritize arrows in your inventory, that's all.
## For Bows
- Works with infinity (only with normal arrows)
- Get rid of that situation where you need to spend 1 slot with 1 arrow

![example1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f49f4d294bcea982322df468e87795ba9fe1651a.png)

## For Crossbows
- Works with fireworks (only when the bundle/shulker are in the offhand)

![example2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9477a8bd93d462898115455ce2b08c7c19bd28e.png)
